---
title: "Particpation à l'OSM 2026"
date: "2026-02-23"
categories: [Congress]
image : image.jpg
---

Yesterday, I presented my poster about a review on pressure compensation for deep see sampling in [**#OSM2026**](https://www.linkedin.com/feed/hashtag/osm2026?trk=public_post_embed-text) international congress at Glasgow [**#APERO**](https://www.linkedin.com/feed/hashtag/apero?trk=public_post_embed-text), [**#HOTDOG**](https://www.linkedin.com/feed/hashtag/hotdog?trk=public_post_embed-text), [**CNRS**](https://www.linkedin.com/company/cnrs?trk=public_post_embed-text) , [**ICMCB**](https://www.linkedin.com/company/icmcb?trk=public_post_embed-text), [**#CNRSTerre_et_Univers**](https://www.linkedin.com/feed/hashtag/cnrsterreAbRetAbRunivers?trk=public_post_embed-text)
